title: Braže: speed of Russian advance in Ukraine 'an insult to snails'
summary_full: Latvian Foriegn Minister Baiba Braže was in Tallinn, Estonia on May 16th, taking part in the annual Lennart Meri Conference, a geopolitical meeting named after the distinguished former Estonian president.
